message:
feat(codegen): Migrate _stat_mod.zig, float_conv.zig, for_special.zig to builder API

- _stat_mod.zig: genSIMODE uses withParensCtx for bitwise and
- float_conv.zig: emitFloatErrorHandling uses withParensCtx
- for_special.zig: List literal iteration uses emitParens

All patterns now use auto-closing helpers to prevent bracket mismatches.
